name: archon-cockroach-memory
description: Archon Memory — an agentic financial-intelligence app using CockroachDB (distributed vector indexing) as the agents' persistent memory layer, on AWS Bedrock.

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/memory.test.ts tests/narrator.test.ts tests/consistency.test.ts tests/pipeline.test.ts tests/consistency.e2e.test.ts tests/load.test.ts tests/integration.test.ts tests/fanout.test.ts tests/mcp.test.ts tests/security.test.ts tests/e2e.test.ts tests/readiness.test.ts tests/bedrock.integration.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage: node --import tsx --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-concurrency=1 tests/memory.test.ts tests/narrator.test.ts tests/consistency.test.ts tests/pipeline.test.ts tests/consistency.e2e.test.ts tests/load.test.ts tests/integration.test.ts tests/fanout.test.ts tests/mcp.test.ts tests/security.test.ts tests/e2e.test.ts tests/readiness.test.ts tests/bedrock.integration.test.ts
